name: Jason Kander
subject: All of us count
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Sherrod Brown
body:
|
---

| | It seems like a very simple idea, Peter. In a democracy, all of us count. Throughout our history, we've fought hard for that idea. In 1965, thousands began their march from Selma, Alabama to the capitol in Montgomery to fight for that idea. Unfortunately, the Trump administration and Republicans across the country still don't seem to understand that **all of us count.** All of our voices should be heard. So Republicans rig the system, excluding voters who don't vote Republican. This fight has been especially prevalent in Ohio, where Trump's Justice Department threw its support behind damaging voter roll purges. **And where the Trump administration is aiming to defeat Senator Sherrod Brown -- a staunch defender of the right to vote.** Sherrod's fighting like hell for Ohio -- and that includes keeping access to polls open and accessible. [**_He has a big FEC deadline at the end of the month, and I'm hoping I can convince you to pitch in $5, $10, or more to help get him to his $320,000 goal._**](http://oh.sherrodbrown.com/page/m/302ffb89/4462dc26/421bc3ee/2000463e/360680983/VEsH/p/eyJKU1ZEVDA1VEpTVT0iOiIzMjY4MTgzIiwiZTN0emJIVm5mWDA9Ijoic2JlMTgwMzI4IiwiZTN0MlpYSnphVzl1ZlgwPSI6Im0ifQ==/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/sbe180328?refcode=sbe180328_m_other&refcode2=3268183") _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through $10](http://oh.sherrodbrown.com/page/m/302ffb89/4462dc26/421bc3ee/2000463d/360680983/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZEVDA1VEpTVT0iOiIzMjY4MTgzIiwiZTN0emJIVm5mWDA9Ijoic2JlMTgwMzI4IiwiZTN0aGJXOTFiblI5ZlE9PSI6IjEwIiwiZTN0MlpYSnphVzl1ZlgwPSI6Im0ifQ==/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/sbe180328?express_lane=true&amount=10&refcode=sbe180328_m_10&refcode2=3268183")** **[Express Donate: $26](http://oh.sherrodbrown.com/page/m/302ffb89/4462dc26/421bc3ee/2000463d/360680983/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZEVDA1VEpTVT0iOiIzMjY4MTgzIiwiZTN0emJIVm5mWDA9Ijoic2JlMTgwMzI4IiwiZTN0aGJXOTFiblI5ZlE9PSI6IjI2IiwiZTN0MlpYSnphVzl1ZlgwPSI6Im0ifQ==/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/sbe180328?express_lane=true&amount=26&refcode=sbe180328_m_26&refcode2=3268183")** **[Or donate another amount.](http://oh.sherrodbrown.com/page/m/302ffb89/4462dc26/421bc3ee/2000463e/360680983/VEsF/p/eyJKU1ZEVDA1VEpTVT0iOiIzMjY4MTgzIiwiZTN0emJIVm5mWDA9Ijoic2JlMTgwMzI4IiwiZTN0MlpYSnphVzl1ZlgwPSI6Im0ifQ==/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/sbe180328?refcode=sbe180328_m_other&refcode2=3268183")** If elections in this country were based on which side has the better ideas, Sherrod would have this in the bag. No one works harder for Ohio families than he does. But elections aren't just about ideas anymore -- they're about money, too. Trump-allied special interests have a lot of money to spend and no qualms about spending it. Sherrod is one of their top targets. Sherrod is a champion for the right to vote -- but he can't defend it as well from his couch in Cleveland. We need him in the U.S. Senate. [**_Peter, chip in $5 or more toward Sherrod's FEC goal._**](http://oh.sherrodbrown.com/page/m/302ffb89/4462dc26/421bc3ee/2000463e/360680983/VEsC/p/eyJKU1ZEVDA1VEpTVT0iOiIzMjY4MTgzIiwiZTN0emJIVm5mWDA9Ijoic2JlMTgwMzI4IiwiZTN0MlpYSnphVzl1ZlgwPSI6Im0ifQ==/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/sbe180328?refcode=sbe180328_m_other&refcode2=3268183") Thanks! Jason Kander

body:

I thought I'd reach out personally to let you know where we stand, with less than 48 hours to go until the most important deadline yet of our campaign.

Right now, we have $53,446 left to raise by midnight on Saturday. If we don't hit our goal, the dark money groups that want to see us lose will feel emboldened. They'll step up their efforts to distort our message.

We cannot allow that to happen. Can you contribute right away using this link?

**[http://act.kyrstensinema.com/deadline](http://act.kyrstensinema.com/page/m/595d0fd5/45aebd3c/449e7c74/2cae0fd6/3327181641/VEsH/ "http://act.kyrstensinema.com/deadline?utm_medium=email&utm_source=sinema&utm_content=1+-+httpactkyrstensinemacomdeadline&utm_campaign=KS_EM_FR_LDND_180329_5_12&source=KS_EM_FR_LDND_180329_5_12&refcode=KS_EM_FR_LDND_180329_5_12")**

Thanks again for all you do.

Kyrsten

name: The White House
subject: It’s time to rebuild
body:
1600 Daily
https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=0a832e10d61b66f2f32ff3f1ae5d4ab7909ed8bf6f2346950afb3565afab7c3767b2f19b852af7b37c41b7208a0a8460db2a22aaf8bf49a9

It’s time to rebuild

“America is a Nation, like you, of builders. A Nation of pioneers. A Nation that accepts no limits,” President Donald J. Trump told a group of workers outside of Cleveland, Ohio, yesterday. “We don’t give up.”

With those words, the President launched what he likes to call “the next phase of America’s economic comeback”—an investment of more than $1.5 trillion in Federal and non-Federal spending to rebuild America’s crumbling infrastructure. The plan incentivizes State, local, and private investment while getting Washington out of the way with fewer regulatory hurdles and a streamlined permitting process.

“Washington spent trillions building up foreign countries while allowing OUR OWN infrastructure to fall into a state of total disrepair,” President Trump tweeted yesterday. “No more! It's time to REBUILD, and we will do it with American WORKERS, American GRIT, and American PRIDE!”

Read more:
https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=0a832e10d61b66f21d0c78c0407820029af50fe9d9696f920d0cdfa76d07f3aa671161102132b0dcec1671690eeae6be49211f6d476f147c
How President Trump wants Washington to start investing in America again

A weekend of sacred celebrations

Many Americans will observe important religious holidays this weekend as the calendar turns to April. Tonight marks the beginning of the Jewish holiday of Passover, which continues until the evening of April 7. Today is also the Christian observance of Good Friday, followed by Easter Sunday this weekend.

President Trump offers his blessings to followers of both faiths. “At this holy time of the year, families across our Nation gather in homes, churches, and synagogues to light candles and to praise God,” the President says in a video address. “Both of these sacred celebrations remind us that God’s love redeems the world.”

The First Family will also host the 140th Annual Easter Egg Roll on the White House’s South Lawn this Monday.

https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=0a832e10d61b66f2e195c4a0b569d07e929b81f91f96a07ad3526014ac5961921a6edbd12b7e3ffba78a0ba39bc0652b5223e36804e2490e
Watch President Trump’s video message for Passover and Easter

Can’t argue with results

Thanks to the tax cuts signed into law by President Trump in December, more than 470 companies have announced pay raises, bonuses, utility rate cuts, 401(k) hikes, or other expanded benefits, according to the nonprofit Americans for Tax Reform.

This week, McDonald’s—as of 2015, the world’s second-largest private employer—joined this growing list. The company is expanding its education benefits program for workers, in some cases even tripling the amount of money employees are eligible to receive to help pay for college or trade school tuition.

News also broke this week that U.S. jobless claims have declined to their lowest level since 1973. “Can’t argue with the results,” Press Secretary Sarah Sanders tweeted. “President Trump’s policies are working.”

Read more:
https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=0a832e10d61b66f21df136b7fb3c597c843698a42a1e3f0bff694214842511143399278430b26df2c6d4d2257fa9c00ce1b73335c6cb26e2
President Trump’s tax cuts are a windfall for Americans

Photo of the Day

First Lady Melania Trump visits the Palm Beach Children’s Hospital at the St. Mary’s Medical Center | March 29, 2018 (Official White House Photo by Andrea Hanks)

https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=0a832e10d61b66f2bf70215a33a2c4a3fc2cf8e2c2eef9931cb340a5fdeff42dc36f1e1dd54585365881050507d77002858f1dc2797a7888
Privacy Policy |

https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=0a832e10d61b66f2a8e1f49f633099738367a774a77390131c37656e7c3e5ab2daf096f33dd04791e3659eb26aa6b08f3fd78f0593c3767c
Contact the White House |

https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/unsub_center.aspx?qs=d453c42a6560d1d4251a27582730f94ba6128f2ed13d675be9acfa2f09b0863a8105a703843ddb8d1e35156b6399805556e32d0e98e92e618cd71c708c2294be
Unsubscribe

name: Scott Wallace
subject: Fighting for your rights
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Scott Wallace for Congress
body:
Friend,

As a kid, I watched my parents fight for women's rights as activists with Planned Parenthood of Bucks County. My mom became the organization's president. She also proudly served on the board of the local League of Women Voters. As a young lawyer, I worked for the Philadelphia Women's Law Project, successfully fighting against Pennsylvania's restrictive anti-choice law.

My mom shaped me. She's my hero. I remain inspired by her endless quest to empower women and girls. | [](https://act.myngp.com/el/xd5_rQrDVR1cOj-9S9Dj8w==/zfevGnM27yYjDvsxP4E3qw==)
---
**[Help me continue the fight my mom started. Chip in $5 or more to help us fight for women across the country.](https://act.myngp.com/el/xd5_rQrDVR1cOj-9S9Dj8w==/zfevGnM27yYjDvsxP4E3qw==)**

During the past 15 years running our charitable foundation, the Wallace Global Fund, my wife Christy and I have worked to make sure women have access to family planning, health services, and economic opportunity, all around the world. But now, with the endless assault on Planned Parenthood and reproductive rights, I'm concerned that women in America are at risk of losing hard-fought gains.

Under Trump and the Republican-controlled House, we're seeing toxic levels of backsliding and misogyny -- and zero progress towards cornerstones of equality, like pay equity, universal family and medical leave, and protections for women who have the courage to speak out against sexual assault and domestic violence.

The assault on women's rights mounts daily. Trump embarrasses the nation, and Republicans in Congress sit silently.

**[We need a change in national leadership. Donald Trump, Paul Ryan, and Brian Fitzpatrick must go. Help us fight the status quo and chip in $5 or more today!](https://act.myngp.com/el/xd5_rQrDVR1cOj-9S9Dj8w==/zfevGnM27yYjDvsxP4E3qw==)**

My mom (and my dad too!) worked too hard for too long to have us turn back the clock now.

We are better than this. Please join me in fighting back.

Thanks,

Scott

** **

** **
Paid for by Scott Wallace for Congress
---
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com.
If you no longer wish to receive updates from our campaign, please [unsubscribe](https://act.myngp.com/el/xd5_rQrDVR1cOj-9S9Dj8w==/h__ir-Q0QMGkchglPmOEXg==).

Scott Wallace for Congress
PO BOX 1287
Doylestown, PA 18901

name: =?UTF-8?Q?=E2=9E=A2=E2=9E=A3=E2=9E=A2Team_Kaine?=
subject: Here's why everyone is emailing you
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Kaine for Virginia
body:
Derek, a few people have emailed you lately:
* **Mark Warner - Asking for a quick favor**
* **Anne Holton - 10,000 strong (how cool is that?!)**
* **Tim Kaine - If you read one email today, I hope it's this**

But that's only because this upcoming deadline is so important to our campaign to re-elect Tim. **When we close the books on March, all of our fundraising in 2018 to date goes public, and there 's a couple things we want to make sure people looking at our numbers will see:**
* We are not taking this year for granted,
* The blue wave in Virginia will continue,
* And we are powered by grassroots donors.

There's a lot you can tell by looking at a campaign's public filing report. We need to make sure the Republicans clamoring to unseat Tim in November see that we have a strong coalition. [But we have to pick up the pace if we are going to be able to post 10,000 online donations. Click here to help us get there >>](http://salsa3.salsalabs.com/dia/track.jsp?v=2&c=Y3B1jYpnwGx5%2F%2BXyrM5HvHXirsQos9KU)

Setting ambitious goals and relying on our supporters and team members to get us there is a critical part of what this campaign is all about. And you heard Anne - we can't think of a better set of people to celebrate these quarterly victories with than all of you!

[So please, if you've been waiting for the right time to donate either again or for the first time - this is it! You can follow the link here >>](http://salsa3.salsalabs.com/dia/track.jsp?v=2&c=rYKXW%2B7oxEG%2Fg14yDwZHr3XirsQos9KU)

Grateful for all of you,

clean_body: Derek, a few people have emailed you lately: Mark Warner - Asking for a quick favor Anne Holton - 10,000 strong (how cool is that?!) Tim Kaine - If you read one email today, I hope it's this But that's only because this upcoming deadline is so important to our campaign to re-elect Tim. When we close the books on March, all of our fundraising in 2018 to date goes public, and there 's a couple things we want to make sure people looking at our numbers will see: We are not taking this year for granted, The blue wave in Virginia will continue, And we are powered by grassroots donors. There's a lot you can tell by looking at a campaign's public filing report. We need to make sure the Republicans clamoring to unseat Tim in November see that we have a strong coalition. Setting ambitious goals and relying on our supporters and team members to get us there is a critical part of what this campaign is all about. And you heard Anne - we can't think of a better set of people to celebrate these quarterly victories with than all of you! Grateful for all of you, Team Kaine | | Paid for by Kaine for Virginia | This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com.

name: Keith Ellison
subject: We have ZERO margin for error, Derek
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Democratic National Committee, www
body:
What we're aiming to do before tomorrow's deadline is show that this party in your party. It belongs to you -- and you decide which direction it will take.
---
I'll make this quick, Derek.

Tomorrow is a critical day for Democrats -- it's our first quarterly fundraising deadline of 2018.

Here's why this deadline matters: Right now, the Republican Party controls most levers of power in this country, and they've used their power to make it harder for Democrats to win. A blue wave that could save our country in November is possible, but if we're going to make it happen, we have ZERO margin for error.

We have to hit every deadline and fundraising goal from now until November, and right now, we're looking like we could be short this month. It's not gonna happen without your help, so I need to ask:

**Will you make your first $3 donation of 2018 before tomorrow's CRITICAL quarterly deadline? Every dollar will go directly toward electing Democrats nationwide this year.**

**[ DONATE: $3](https://my.democrats.org/page/m/4052242f/4067b0a/536f6ef2b/7e4c8ff2/2728717258/VEsEAA/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/march-deadline-2018?amount=3&utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=25+-+DONATE+3&utm_campaign=em_20180330_ke_v1s1&source=em_20180330_ke_v1s1&refcode=em_20180330_ke_v1s1")

[DONATE: $100](https://my.democrats.org/page/m/4052242f/4067b0a/536f6ef2b/7e4c8ffe/2728717258/VEsEDA/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/march-deadline-2018?amount=100&utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=29+-+DONATE+100&utm_campaign=em_20180330_ke_v1s1&source=em_20180330_ke_v1s1&refcode=em_20180330_ke_v1s1")
[Or donate another amount.](https://my.democrats.org/page/m/4052242f/4067b0a/536f6ef2b/7e4c8fff/2728717258/VEsFBQ/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/march-deadline-2018?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=30+-+Or+donate+another+amount&utm_campaign=em_20180330_ke_v1s1&source=em_20180330_ke_v1s1&refcode=em_20180330_ke_v1s1")
** What we're aiming to do before tomorrow's deadline is show that this party is _your_ party. It belongs to you -- and you decide which direction it will take.

**[Your contribution today shows you want to own a piece of this party and play a role in shaping its future -- that's what tomorrow's deadline is about. Chip in $3 right now.](https://my.democrats.org/page/m/4052242f/4067b0a/536f6ef2b/7e4c8ffc/2728717258/VEsFBA/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/march-deadline-2018?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=31+-+Your+contribution+today+shows+you+want+t&utm_campaign=em_20180330_ke_v1s1&source=em_20180330_ke_v1s1&refcode=em_20180330_ke_v1s1")**

I can't wait to see what we do together this year.

Keith

Keith Ellison
Deputy Chair
Democratic National Committee

P.S. -- I'm not using hyperbole: If we don't hit our fundraising goal this month, we might not recover before November's elections -- our margin for error is _that_ slim. **[Add your $3 contribution right now.](https://my.democrats.org/page/m/4052242f/4067b0a/536f6ef2b/7e4c8ffd/2728717258/VEsFBw/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/march-deadline-2018?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=32+-+Add+your++if+consinConsGroup28497++set+m&utm_campaign=em_20180330_ke_v1s1&source=em_20180330_ke_v1s1&refcode=em_20180330_ke_v1s1")**

This organization is powered by you, and we'd love to hear your ideas. Send us any comments, criticisms, or feedback [here](https://my.democrats.org/page/m/4052242f/4067b0a/536f6ef2b/7e4c8ff9/2728717258/VEsFAw/ "http://my.democrats.org/page/s/contact-the-democrats?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=36+-+here&utm_campaign=em_20180330_ke_v1s1&source=em_20180330_ke_v1s1&refcode=em_20180330_ke_v1s1"), or just reply to this email! Thanks for supporting our party.

The stakes in Pennsylvania are higher than ever, friends: Americans for Prosperity, a right-wing group backed by the Koch brothers, is spending BIG on attack ads to take down Democrats like Senator Bob Casey!
**_NBC_ is calling this one of the races to watch in 2018, and with _The New York Times_ reporting that Senate control is a TOSS-UP, we know GOP donors will be laser-focused on buying this seat for extremist Representative Lou Barletta.**
This cannot happen. If Democrats want to defend Pennsylvania's Senate seat, we must raise another $18,500 before tomorrow's FEC deadline - but right now we're not on track to meet our goal.

name: Andrew Gillum
subject: Friend, I need your help to win
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Andrew Gillum, Democrat, for Governor
body:
[](http://act.andrewgillum.com/page/m/fcb3139/9e00690/45e3f6b0/24024367/1129844214/VEsH/ "https://andrewgillum.com/?utm_medium=email&utm_source=gillum&utm_content=1&utm_campaign=em18_180330_EOQ4_fnd_gq_act__AG&source=em18_180330_EOQ4_fnd_gq_act__AG")
Friend,

After 20 years of Republican control, it's more clear than ever that Floridians need a fresh approach to solving the problems our state is facing.

The last eight years of Rick Scott's broken promises have left Floridians in a rut. Nearly half of our households are struggling to make ends meet, our coasts are at risk of being sold to the highest bidder, and too many people are left without affordable healthcare options.

As Mayor of Tallahassee I've fought for the people and issues we care about: an economy that's the fastest-growing per capita in the state, businesses that let families get ahead, healthcare for our most vulnerable kids, and equality for all people.

**[That's why I'll waste no time fixing Rick Scott's mistakes -- but I need your help to meet my critical end-of-quarter fundraising deadline first. Can I count on you to chip in before midnight tomorrow?](http://act.andrewgillum.com/page/m/fcb3139/9e00690/45e3f6b0/24024366/1129844214/VEsE/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/gillum-march-eoq?utm_campaign=em18_180330_EOQ4_fnd_gq_act__AG&utm_medium=email&utm_source=Gillum&refcode=em18_180330_EOQ4_fnd_gq_act__AG&utm_content=2+-+Thatrsquos+why+Ill+waste+no+time+fixing+")**

Thanks to the grassroots support from people like you, we're able to elevate our progressive voice and focus on the issues that are critical to everyday Floridians. Our campaign is of, by, and for the people.

And now, with only five months until the primary, and eight months until Election Day, this end-of-quarter deadline is the most critical deadline we've faced yet.

We've got all the momentum in this race -- we just need to put more fuel in the tank. But in order to do that, I need your help to make sure we come out ahead.

**[Chip in now and let's show everyone the momentum we're building, together.](http://act.andrewgillum.com/page/m/fcb3139/9e00690/45e3f6b0/24024379/1129844214/VEsF/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/gillum-march-eoq?utm_campaign=em18_180330_EOQ4_fnd_gq_act__AG&utm_medium=email&utm_source=Gillum&refcode=em18_180330_EOQ4_fnd_gq_act__AG&utm_content=3+-+Chip+in+now+and+letrsquos+show+everyone+")**

Bring it home,

Andrew

[Donate](http://act.andrewgillum.com/page/m/fcb3139/9e00690/45e3f6b0/24024378/1129844214/VEsC/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/gillum-march-eoq?utm_campaign=em18_180330_EOQ4_fnd_gq_act__AG&utm_medium=email&utm_source=Gillum&refcode=em18_180330_EOQ4_fnd_gq_act__AG&utm_content=4+-+Donate")

Paid for by Andrew Gillum, Democrat, for Governor.

---
Andrew Gillum for Governor
1550 Melvin Street,
Tallahassee, FL 32303

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is one of the most important tools we have to reach supporters like you, but you can let us know if you'd like to [receive fewer emails](http://act.andrewgillum.com/page/m/fcb3139/9e00690/45e3f6b0/2402437b/1129844214/VEsD/p/eyJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVmFTVkFsSlE9PSI6IiJ9/ "http://act.andrewgillum.com/page/s/receive-fewer-emails?source=email_footer&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=gillum&utm_content=5+-+receive+fewer+emails&utm_campaign=em18_180330_EOQ4_fnd_gq_act__AG"). name: DNC Headquarters
subject: You're one of the 8 supporters from Manassas we need by tomorrow, Derek
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Democratic National Committee, www
body:
It is critical that we get supporters in Manassas to step up before our FEC deadline on Saturday.
---
Tomorrow at midnight is a critical FEC deadline -- and right now, we're not on track to hit our fundraising goal. If we're going to do it, we need 8 supporters from Manassas to step up in the next 24 hours.

**Make your first $3 donation of 2018 before tomorrow's deadline to show that you're ready to elect Democrats in all 50 states this year. The blue wave won't start unless Manassas is a part of it.**

**[ DONATE: $3](https://my.democrats.org/page/m/4052243a/4067b0a/5354c27a9/7e4f36f2/3139175910/VEsEAA/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/march-deadline-2018?amount=3&utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=25+-+DONATE+3&utm_campaign=em_20180330_dnc_v1s1&source=em_20180330_dnc_v1s1&refcode=em_20180330_dnc_v1s1")

[DONATE: $50](https://my.democrats.org/page/m/4052243a/4067b0a/5354c27a9/7e4f36f1/3139175910/VEsEDQ/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/march-deadline-2018?amount=50&utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=28+-+DONATE+50&utm_campaign=em_20180330_dnc_v1s1&source=em_20180330_dnc_v1s1&refcode=em_20180330_dnc_v1s1")

** This is important, Derek. What we raise before midnight tomorrow will not only put Republicans on high alert -- it will also determine how much we can invest in competitive races and get out the vote nationwide this year.

We've done the math on this: We only need 8 supporters from Manassas to stand with Democrats before tomorrow's critical deadline. Will you be one of them?

The Democrats

Send us any comments, criticisms, or feedback [here](https://my.democrats.org/page/m/4052243a/4067b0a/5354c27a9/7e4f36f8/3139175910/VEsFAA/ "http://my.democrats.org/page/s/contact-the-democrats?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=35+-+here&utm_campaign=em_20180330_dnc_v1s1&source=em_20180330_dnc_v1s1&refcode=em_20180330_dnc_v1s1"), or just reply to this email! name: petition@maggiehassan.com
subject: Support fair and representative elections:
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Maggie for NH
body:
[](http://act.maggiehassan.com/page/m/f7fdf0d/2a380d31/adccfb4/f1fd0a/824295915/VEsH/ "http://www.maggiehassan.com/")
[](http://act.maggiehassan.com/page/m/f7fdf0d/2a380d31/adccfb4/f1fd0a/824295915/VEsE/ "http://www.maggiehassan.com/")
Hi there,
The bad news is that gerrymandering -- drawing political boundaries to give your party an advantage over an opposing party - hurts our democracy.
The worse news is that with critical elections just months away, millions of voters are trapped in unfair districts that courts have ruled unconstitutionally gerrymandered.
**With so many elections and the future of our country on the line, we HAVE to fight against these rigged maps.[Please sign our petition and call on Republicans to end gerrymandering and let all voters have their voices heard.](http://act.maggiehassan.com/page/m/f7fdf0d/2a380d31/adccfb4/f1fd0b/824295915/VEsF/p/eyJKU1ZHU1ZKVFZFNUJUVVVsSlE9PSI6IiIsIkpTVk1RVk5VVGtGTlJTVWwiOiIiLCJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVmFTVkFsSlE9PSI6IjAzMjY0In0=/ "https://petitions.signforgood.com/endgerrymanderingnow/?code=Hassan&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=03264&redirect=https%3A%2F%2Fsecure.actblue.com%2Fdonate%2F2018_gerrymandering-up%3Frefcode%3D2018_gerrymanderingja_up")**
Thank you for being an advocate for fair and representative elections -- your voice really makes a difference.
-- Team Maggie

clean_body: "" "" Hi there, The bad news is that gerrymandering -- drawing political boundaries to give your party an advantage over an opposing party - hurts our democracy. The worse news is that with critical elections just months away, millions of voters are trapped in unfair districts that courts have ruled unconstitutionally gerrymandered. With so many elections and the future of our country on the line, we HAVE to fight against these rigged maps. "" Thank you for being an advocate for fair and representative elections -- your voice really makes a difference. -- Team Maggie ""

name: Tim Kaine
subject: One more thing from me
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Kaine for Virginia
body:
Derek,

I wanted to send you one more note as we close out this major fundraising month (the last one from me, at least - I'm sure my team will try and get a few more in your inbox before the clock strikes [midnight tomorrow...)](http://salsa3.salsalabs.com/dia/track.jsp?v=2&c=910myKibmUKucc1%2BU9h%2BNkqwAj21dPP%2F)

**2018 is going to be about running good races.** With a more politically conscious electorate than ever before, it's going to be about running campaigns that are in touch, smart, engaging, and values-based. [So when my team and I reach out to ask for your support, whether it's a vote, a donation, or just asking you to talk to your neighbors, it's because we want this campaign to be powered by _YOU._](http://salsa3.salsalabs.com/dia/track.jsp?v=2&c=bl5oVg8yiA7mq2q0SvJ2PkqwAj21dPP%2F)

I know you're getting a lot of emails lately, but I hope if there's anything you take away from this crazy time of year, it's that _you_ have the power to decide the outcomes on [November 6th](http://salsa3.salsalabs.com/dia/track.jsp?v=2&c=T%2FUPIMy9IZq1IjAG1sdiX0qwAj21dPP%2F) and that you are the backbone of campaigns like mine. _We can 't do any of this without your support._

[I'm still aiming for 10,000 contributions this quarter, from first time donors as well as frequent donors. I sure hope you're with me. Follow this link if you can help out today >>](http://salsa3.salsalabs.com/dia/track.jsp?v=2&c=4%2BJv4Oeh2GfH28OGKTAYpkqwAj21dPP%2F)

Thanks,

_Tim_

name: =?utf-8?Q?Indiana=20Republican=20Party?=
subject: Your party, your voice
body:
Here at your Indiana Republican Party, we call ourselves Indiana's only Party of Purpose, and that's because of the strong values, bold ideas... | | |
---
| |
---
| [ ](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=b799cd9c09&e=1acd9bb3d6)
---
| **_Your Party, Your Voice_** Here at your Indiana Republican Party, we call ourselves Indiana's _only_ Party of Purpose, and that's because of the strong values, bold ideas, and real solutions that we're delivering to Hoosiers today. And every two years, as a party we put those values, ideas, and solutions into a document called our party platform.

The development of our party platform comes from Hoosier Republicans like you. This year, we're holding three platform committee hearings across the state, where you have an opportunity to testify on your views on the top issues facing Indiana. We'll use this testimony to help shape the development of our 2018 platform that will then be ratified at our convention in Evansville.

The first platform committee hearing is _next Wednesday in Central Indiana_ , followed by a hearing on _April 12 in Northern Indiana_ and another hearing in _Southern Indiana on April 16_. [Check out full details here](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=100c607a5d&e=1acd9bb3d6).

If you'd like to sign up to testify at one of these hearings, just email us at [platform@indiana.gop](mailto:platform@indiana.gop) to register for a time slot. Or if you can't make it, you can also send us written testimony at the same address.

These platform hearings are a great display of where we are as a party today, and what our future holds. If you're available, we'd love to see you there!

-Kyle Hupfer

_Picture: Indiana Republican Party Chairman Kyle Hupfer joins Indiana Public Broadcasting's Brandon Smith and a representative from the Indiana Democratic Party at the Indy Chamber's Pancakes & Politics breakfast this week. _
---
| |
---
| | **_Governor Holcomb's Week That Was_**
---
|
---
| **_Taking Indiana to the World_**
As Indiana's salesman-in-chief, **Governor Eric Holcomb** likes to say that he's "taking Indiana to the world, and bringing the world to Indiana." And that's exactly what he did this week, visiting our neighbors to the north on a three-day economic development trade mission to Canada!

Canada is Indiana's largest trade partner, with more than 70 Canadian-owned businesses employing nearly 16,000 Hoosiers. This means that relationship-building trips like this have a big impact on people and communities throughout our state.

While traveling across both Ontario and Québec on this week's jam-packed trip, Governor Holcomb helped lead a business roundtable with Canadian and Indiana businesses, met with companies in the aerospace industry, and hosted a reception for leaders of the logistics industry.

He also met with government leaders at all levels, including Canadian Prime Minster Justin Trudeau. It's not every day you get to meet with a foreign head of government -- and this provided another great opportunity to highlight the Indiana-Canada relationship.

Thanks, Governor Holcomb, for your work this week telling the world about this great place we call home!
---
|
---
| [ ](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=8780fddf6b&e=1acd9bb3d6)
---
**_RNC Chairwoman Keynoting 2018 Indiana Republican State Convention_** Big news! **Ronna McDaniel** , the chair of the Republican National Committee (RNC), will be our keynote speaker this June at the 2018 Indiana Republican State Convention in Evansville!

Chairwoman McDaniel, who is leading the RNC to [record fundraising](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=69bc46d86f&e=1acd9bb3d6) and the [strongest data network and ground game](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=0c77ec567d&e=1acd9bb3d6) we've ever possessed (that's already at work here in Indiana), will tell her personal story and share the RNC's plan to maintain our Republican majorities in Congress this November (including beating Democrat Joe Donnelly!).

You've seen her on TV, and now you can see her in Evansville! Check out our [state convention website](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=91268420f6&e=1acd9bb3d6), and reach out to [your county Republican chair](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=51cac1f0b5&e=1acd9bb3d6) if you're interested in serving as a delegate to this year's big convention.
|
---
| [ ](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=fdf496dc7b&e=1acd9bb3d6)
---
**_We Need You!_**
Do you have opinions on the biggest issues facing Indiana today? Of course you do! That's why we need Hoosier Republicans like you to provide input as we begin the process of drafting our 2018 Republican Party Platform.

**Voice your opinion!** Sign-up today for a time slot to testify at one of three platform committee hearings we're hosting across the state. Register by emailing us at [**platform@indiana.gop**](mailto:platform@indiana.gop).

If you're not able to attend your local hearing, you can also submit your written testimony by emailing**[platform@indiana.gop](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=3a50152fb9&e=1acd9bb3d6) **For more information, click **[HERE](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=26769dde18&e=1acd9bb3d6)**.
|
---
| _**Upcoming Republican Events**_
[March 30](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=ba4f5330a9&e=1acd9bb3d6) \- Monroe County Lincoln Day Dinner with Congressman Jim Banks

clean_body: Here at your Indiana Republican Party, we call ourselves Indiana's only Party of Purpose, and that's because of the strong values, bold ideas... | | | | | | | Your Party, Your Voice Here at your Indiana Republican Party, we call ourselves Indiana's only Party of Purpose, and that's because of the strong values, bold ideas, and real solutions that we're delivering to Hoosiers today. And every two years, as a party we put those values, ideas, and solutions into a document called our party platform. The development of our party platform comes from Hoosier Republicans like you. This year, we're holding three platform committee hearings across the state, where you have an opportunity to testify on your views on the top issues facing Indiana. We'll use this testimony to help shape the development of our 2018 platform that will then be ratified at our convention in Evansville. The first platform committee hearing is next Wednesday in Central Indiana , followed by a hearing on April 12 in Northern Indiana and another hearing in Southern Indiana on April 16. . If you'd like to sign up to testify at one of these hearings, just email us at mailto:platform@indiana.gop to register for a time slot. Or if you can't make it, you can also send us written testimony at the same address. These platform hearings are a great display of where we are as a party today, and what our future holds. If you're available, we'd love to see you there! -Kyle Hupfer Picture: Indiana Republican Party Chairman Kyle Hupfer joins Indiana Public Broadcasting's Brandon Smith and a representative from the Indiana Democratic Party at the Indy Chamber's Pancakes & Politics breakfast this week. | | | | Governor Holcomb's Week That Was | | Taking Indiana to the World As Indiana's salesman-in-chief, Governor Eric Holcomb likes to say that he's "taking Indiana to the world, and bringing the world to Indiana." And that's exactly what he did this week, visiting our neighbors to the north on a three-day economic development trade mission to Canada! Canada is Indiana's largest trade partner, with more than 70 Canadian-owned businesses employing nearly 16,000 Hoosiers. This means that relationship-building trips like this have a big impact on people and communities throughout our state. While traveling across both Ontario and Québec on this week's jam-packed trip, Governor Holcomb helped lead a business roundtable with Canadian and Indiana businesses, met with companies in the aerospace industry, and hosted a reception for leaders of the logistics industry. He also met with government leaders at all levels, including Canadian Prime Minster Justin Trudeau. It's not every day you get to meet with a foreign head of government -- and this provided another great opportunity to highlight the Indiana-Canada relationship. Thanks, Governor Holcomb, for your work this week telling the world about this great place we call home! | | RNC Chairwoman Keynoting 2018 Indiana Republican State Convention Big news! Ronna McDaniel , the chair of the Republican National Committee (RNC), will be our keynote speaker this June at the 2018 Indiana Republican State Convention in Evansville! Chairwoman McDaniel, who is leading the RNC to and the we've ever possessed (that's already at work here in Indiana), will tell her personal story and share the RNC's plan to maintain our Republican majorities in Congress this November (including beating Democrat Joe Donnelly!). You've seen her on TV, and now you can see her in Evansville! Check out our , and reach out to if you're interested in serving as a delegate to this year's big convention. | | We Need You! Do you have opinions on the biggest issues facing Indiana today? Of course you do! That's why we need Hoosier Republicans like you to provide input as we begin the process of drafting our 2018 Republican Party Platform. Voice your opinion! Sign-up today for a time slot to testify at one of three platform committee hearings we're hosting across the state. Register by emailing us at mailto:platform@indiana.gop. If you're not able to attend your local hearing, you can also submit your written testimony by emailing For more information, click . | | Upcoming Republican Events \- Monroe County Lincoln Day Dinner Friend,

I know the President emailed you, but now I want to follow up.

We’re facing our FIRST FEC end-of-quarter deadline of the 2018 election year, and we still need to raise another $130,865 to ensure we hit our goal.

Will you be the one who pushes us over the top?
---

**[CONTRIBUTE $1](http://click.campaigns.rnchq.com/?qs=8cc7ef0e16daaf223c3abc9d6d72710348c58019060c0635812c8808050c1e44a3f91cda2b5613116fe742fde7b2e511bfcae69611e218c0)** The mainstream media is going to compare our FEC report side-by-side with the Democrats' and they're desperately hoping to say that a blue wave is coming this November.

We will prove to every LIBERAL talking head in the media that our movement is still alive. We will keep fighting to elect CONSERVATIVE champions who believe in building the wall, unleashing America's economy, draining the swamp, and putting America First.

name: Chris Van Hollen
subject: 62 percent
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Van Hollen for US Senate
body:
| __
Last Saturday, I was proud to march with incredible student leaders from Maryland and around the country to demand real action to save lives by passing common sense gun laws.

Now that the March for Our Lives is over, the NRA and the gun lobby are counting on us to give up and go away. But we are not going to do that. We must show them that we are in this fight until Congress takes meaningful action to end the carnage and reduce the daily toll of gun violence in our country.

The political math is simple -- to pass life-saving national legislation, we need to have the votes. And to get the votes, we need to win elections. That means winning big Senate races in states like Florida, Nevada and elsewhere where Republican Senate candidates have A+ ratings from the NRA, while Democratic Senate candidates support common-sense measures like a universal background check and a ban on military-style assault rifles.

[**I hope you will stand with me in this critical fight to help Senate Democratic candidates win this November so we can make progress on this and many other issues. Please donate now, before the first Federal Election Commission (FEC) filing deadline of 2018 on Saturday, to help me ensure we have the resources to stand up to attacks from the NRA and win key Senate elections in November >>**](http://action.vanhollen.org/page/m/2de91842/70cdc2ba/460a4b67/3903624/2564543131/VEsH/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/fecsenatedeadline?refcode=CVH_EM_EOM_FULL_180329_1_1&amount=25&recurring=auto&utm_medium=email&utm_source=cvanhollen&utm_content=1+-+I+hope+you+will+stand+with+me+in+this+cr&utm_campaign=CVH_EM_EOM_FULL_180330_1_1&source=CVH_EM_EOM_FULL_180330_1_1")

The terrible toll of gun violence has been taking lives in Maryland and around the country for way too long. No state or family is immune. Despite our strong gun laws here in Maryland, 62 percent of the guns used in crime in Baltimore come from states with looser laws. Prayers are not enough. Focused political efforts are necessary.

[**The first FEC deadline of the 2018 midterms is on Saturday, and we need your help now to win these campaigns.**](http://action.vanhollen.org/page/m/2de91842/70cdc2ba/460a4b67/3903625/2564543131/VEsE/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/fecsenatedeadline?refcode=CVH_EM_EOM_FULL_180329_1_1&amount=25&recurring=auto&utm_medium=email&utm_source=cvanhollen&utm_content=2+-+The+first+FEC+deadline+of+the+2018+midte&utm_campaign=CVH_EM_EOM_FULL_180330_1_1&source=CVH_EM_EOM_FULL_180330_1_1")

In recent months we have all been moved by the enthusiasm and activism of young people who have mobilized and organized to make our country a better and safer place. Since the election of Donald Trump, people of all ages here in our state and across the country have stepped up to make their voices heard and to make a difference.

I am proud to work with each of you and to represent Maryland at this critical moment. Working together I know we can get this job done.

Thank you for all that you do!

Chris Van Hollen
U.S. Senator

---

Paid for by Van Hollen for US Senate
---
Van Hollen for Senate
10605 Concord Street, Suite 202
Kensington, MD 20895

Thank you for standing with Chris!

We believe that emails are a vital way to stay in direct contact with supporters. You're receiving this email at dpwillis67@gmail.com. [**Click here**](http://action.vanhollen.org/page/m/2de91842/70cdc2ba/460a4b67/3903622/2564543131/VEsF/ "http://action.vanhollen.org/unsubscribe?utm_medium=email&utm_source=cvanhollen&utm_content=3+-+Click+here&utm_campaign=CVH_EM_EOM_FULL_180330_1_1&source=CVH_EM_EOM_FULL_180330_1_1") if you'd like to unsubscribe from these messages. Please enter dpwillis67@gmail.com to ensure that we are able to unsubscribe you from our list. To support Chris, send a check to the address above, or [**click here.**](http://action.vanhollen.org/page/m/2de91842/70cdc2ba/460a4b67/3903623/2564543131/VEsC/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cvh-footer?amount=25.00&recurring=auto&utm_medium=email&utm_source=cvanhollen&utm_content=4+-+click+here&utm_campaign=CVH_EM_EOM_FULL_180330_1_1&source=CVH_EM_EOM_FULL_180330_1_1")

name: Senator Chris Van Hollen
subject: Senate Update: Standing Together to Fight Back
body:
| | | [Click here to open this e-mail in its own browser window](https://outreach.senate.gov/iqextranet//view_newsletter_setup.aspx?link=SenVanHollen%2501133831%2501End%2bof%2bMarch%2bNewsletter%250114220.9450790.3911836.7517223%2501dpwillis67%2540gmail.com%2501Friend%2501dpwillis67%2540gmail.com%2501Silver%2bSpring%252c%2bMD%2b20906%2501) | [Click here to open a plain text version of this email](https://outreach.senate.gov/iqextranet//view_newsletter_setup.aspx?plain_text=Y&link=SenVanHollen%2501133831%2501End%2bof%2bMarch%2bNewsletter%250114220.9450790.3911836.7517223%2501dpwillis67%2540gmail.com%2501Friend%2501dpwillis67%2540gmail.com%2501Silver%2bSpring%252c%2bMD%2b20906%2501)
---|---
| | | **March 30, 2018** |
---|---|---|---
| | | I was proud to join students from Maryland and across the nation last Saturday for the March for Our Lives. We must put an end to the horror of school shootings from Parkland, Florida to Great Mills High School in St. Mary's County, and reduce the daily toll of gun violence in our streets. Inaction is complicity.

Last week, the Congress took some tiny steps in the right direction--improving the reporting of information to the National Instant Criminal Background Check System; clarifying that the Centers for Disease Control can study the causes of gun violence; and boosting resources for school safety programs. But much more needs to be done. The students who organized the March understand that it was only the first step in building a strong, sustainable political movement to pass common sense gun-safety laws to save lives. The gun lobby is counting on the movement to fade away--we cannot allow that to happen. I have been moved by the enthusiasm and activism of America's students, and I am proud to represent young people who are so engaged and thoughtful. This may be a long battle, but we're in this together.

From addressing gun violence, to improving access to health care, to ensuring a quality education for all, there are many pressing issues we must tackle. I am grateful for your input on those and the other challenges we face. Chris Van Hollen
---
### Budget
Last week, after much negotiation, the Senate passed, and I supported, an Omnibus Appropriations bill to fund the government for Fiscal Year 2018\. While not perfect, the budget included many vital investments for Maryland and the nation. The legislation includes historic investments to fight the opioid epidemic and boost funding for life-saving medical research at places like the National Institutes of Health. It increases funding for every level of education, helps working families better afford child care, and expands incentives to build affordable housing. It will help rebuild veterans' facilities, expand access to high-speed internet, and provide student loan debt relief to many teachers, public safety officials, and others in public service. It also includes funding for programs crucial to our communities, like the Child Care and Development Block Grant, the Community Development Block Grant, and the Community Development Financial Institutions Fund. For Maryland specifically, this bill includes some crucial investments. The bill provides full funding for the Chesapeake Bay protection program. The Bay is not only a natural treasure, its health is vital to Maryland's economy. The budget plan also makes important investments in critical infrastructure like the Washington Metro; the Port of Baltimore; and economic development in Western Maryland through the Appalachian Regional Commission--as well as investments in NASA's launch site on Wallops Island that employs hundreds of engineers and technicians from Maryland's Eastern Shore. Other investments support the work of important missions at federal facilities throughout Maryland, including the civilian agencies of FDA, NIH, NASA, IRS, NIST, NOAA, the Census Bureau, the Social Security Administration, the Agricultural Research Service, and military installations like Fort Meade, Fort Detrick, Aberdeen Proving Ground, Naval Air Station Patuxent River, Carderock Naval Surface Warfare Center, Naval Support Facility Indian Head, and Joint Base Andrews.
### School Funding
Schools should have the resources they need to provide a quality education to all their students, including those with disabilities. In 1975, Congress passed the Individuals with Disabilities Education Act (IDEA) to ensure that every child with disabilities has access to educational opportunity. This legislation was a historic step forward--but since its passage, Congress has failed to provide the funding promised under this law. That shortfall in federal funding reduces the resources available to all students at our schools. It's past time that we fulfill this commitment to our students, parents, and teachers. That's why I've introduced legislation to fully fund IDEA and ensure a first-class education for every child. I urge my colleagues to pass this important legislation immediately.
### Getting Around our Great State
As your Senator, I'm fortunate to have the opportunity to visit every corner of our great state, which is often called "America in Miniature" because Maryland is so geographically and demographically diverse. Last month I was on the Eastern Shore, and over the past few weeks, I've been in Prince Frederick, Aberdeen, Suitland, Baltimore, Adelphi, Frostburg, Williamsport, La Plata, and Towson--and many places in between. Earlier this month, I was in Charles and Calvert Counties. In Prince Frederick, I was honored to recognize some truly amazing women and girls at the Calvert County Commission for Women and the League of Women Voters' Women of the World Banquet. In Port Tobacco, I experienced the culture of the Piscataway Conoy Tribe at their Annual Seed Gathering Festival. In La Plata, I toured LifeStyles of Maryland, a nonprofit that supports people in need. LifeStyles' signature programs include the Samaritan Program, a food and clothing service, and Safe Nights, an overnight shelter program for individuals and families. During the tour, I was able to meet with staff and community members to learn more about the crucial services LifeStyles provides. In addition to these visits in Southern Maryland, I joined the Army Alliance at Aberdeen Proving Ground. Aberdeen is one of the oldest active military installations, dating back to the First World War. It's a key national defense asset and an economic driver for Maryland--employing over 23,000 employees and bringing in over $7 billion to our state in the past year alone. But it doesn't just stop there: the groundbreaking research and development being done at Aberdeen helps support members of our military who keep America safe throughout the world. I also recently visited Mary's Center--a community health center with locations in Adelphi and Silver Spring that provides a wide range of health and social services. I spoke with the patients, nurses, and doctors at the Center, seeing first-hand the care they provide and learning how crucial federal funding is to their mission. I'm impressed by the good work they do in our community and fought successfully to ensure that funding for Community Health Centers was included in the recent bipartisan budget deal negotiated in the Senate.
|
---
[Please click here to unsubscribe](https://outreach.senate.gov/iqextranet//EsurveyForm.aspx?__cid=SenVanHollen&__sid=100007&__crop=14220.9450790.3911836.7517223)

name: DNC HQ
subject: Organize locally → Win in November
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Democratic National Committee, www
body:
The Democratic Party is no longer in the business of organizing every four years -- we're taking every single race seriously and organizing 365 days a year.
---
The Democratic Party is no longer in the business of organizing only every four years -- we're taking every single race seriously and organizing 365 days a year. I'm proud of that, and I hope you are too, Derek.

But the reality of the situation is that running a program that organizes 365 days a year is considerably more expensive -- and that's why this fundraising deadline is so important.

**You haven't donated yet this year -- will you make your first $3 contribution of 2018 before tomorrow's critical FEC fundraising deadline? Your contribution will help Democrats organize nationwide.**

** When you contribute to the Democratic Party, you make it possible for Democrats to organize across the country, including:

* Investing in candidates and state parties to give them the resources they need for success
* Organizing on the ground early to talk directly with voters about the issues that will get them to the polls
* Reaching an unprecedented 50 million voters by November -- because that's what it will require to take back Congress this year

Your support will make a huge difference in this election, Derek -- that's why it's so important that you step up before tomorrow's end-of-quarter deadline.

**[Make your first $3 donation of 2018 before tomorrow's deadline to invest in Democrats up and down the ballot this year.](https://my.democrats.org/page/m/4052244e/4067b0a/533d0b15d/7e4f064d/2891720990/VEsFBA/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/march-deadline-2018?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=31+-++if+consinConsGroup29422+Donate+another+&utm_campaign=em_20180330_dnc4_v1s2&source=em_20180330_dnc4_v1s2&refcode=em_20180330_dnc4_v1s2")**

Empowering Democrats at the state and local level is how we win. Thank you for being a part of it.

Allison

Director of States

name: Hannah Zimmerman, Our Revolution
subject: The NRA doesn't think young people will vote
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY OUR REVOLUTION
body:
The march is only the beginning of our fight.
#
Friends,
The March For Our Lives was a once in a lifetime mobilization that brought together millions of Americans calling for change.
**It was also the moment a new generation decided to lead America.**
The politicians bankrolled by the NRA are putting millions of children at risk of being massacred, just so a few big gun companies can enjoy record profits without regulations.
**Now, young people are taking on the corporate gun lobby and reclaiming our democracy.**
**The march is only the beginning of our fight.** Now, we're following the call to vote out the corrupt politicians who stand in the way of banning assault weapons, closing the gun show loopholes, and making it harder for people with backgrounds of mental illness to obtain guns.
[**Contribute $5 to our efforts to get out the youth vote in 2018 and vote out NRA-backed politicians.**](https://go.ourrevolution.com/page/m/2ba7ac6d/bed43eb/5acf971b/75fe6d5e/2973384960/VEsH/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ourrev-2018?refcode=em180330-full")
The epidemic of gun violence is destroying communities across the country. It affects all of us--rich and poor, LGBTQ and straight, old and young. As the students from Parkland highlighted, the burden of gun violence falls most heavily upon black and brown communities that also suffer from generations of plunder and oppression.
The politicians who take the NRA's money and beat back attempts to keep guns out of the hands of those who should not have them don't value the lives of those affected by this epidemic.
**The NRA and the politicians they buy are betting young people are too lazy to vote in 2018.** They think they can keep stalling on any gun control measures until the public's attention has moved on. They think their seats are safe because young people don't vote in midterm elections.
It's time to prove them wrong--and vote them out.
[**Contribute $5 to our efforts to mobilize young people to vote in 2018 and get rid of candidates who support the NRA.**](https://go.ourrevolution.com/page/m/2ba7ac6d/bed43eb/5acf971b/75fe6d5e/2973384960/VEsE/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ourrev-2018?refcode=em180330-full")
If young people vote in 2018 the Blue Wave will turn into a Blue Tsunami. Your contribution will support our texting, calling, and canvassing programs to reach even more people and turn them out to vote.
Our Revolution was inspired to keep up the energy generated by Senator Sanders' presidential run in 2016--especially among young people. Our mission to transform our democracy and take on the oligarchy will be led by the young people who are at the forefront of this fight.
In solidarity,
Hannah Zimmerman
Our Revolution Stanford
**[CONTRIBUTE»](https://go.ourrevolution.com/page/m/2ba7ac6d/bed43eb/5acf971b/75fe6d5e/2973384960/VEsF/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ourrev-2018?refcode=em180330-full")**
PAID FOR BY OUR REVOLUTION
PO Box 66208
WASHINGTON, DC, 20035

Not authorized by any candidate or candidate committee. Our Revolution is a 501(c)(4) organization. Donations to Our Revolution are not deductible as charitable contributions for Federal income tax purposes. All donations are made to support Our Revolution's general mission and are not designated for any specific activity.
PO Box 66208, Washington, DC 20035
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is one of the most important tools we have to reach supporters like you, but you can let us know if you'd like to [receive fewer emails](https://go.ourrevolution.com/page/m/2ba7ac6d/bed43eb/5acf971b/75fe6d58/2973384960/VEsD/p/eyJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVmFTVkFsSlE9PSI6IjIyMTIzIn0=/ "https://go.ourrevolution.com/page/s/OR-fewer-emails?source=email_footer&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=22123"). We'd hate to see you go, but if you need to do so, click here to [unsubscribe](https://go.ourrevolution.com/page/m/2ba7ac6d/bed43eb/5acf971b/75fe6d5b/2973384960/VEsA/ "https://go.ourrevolution.com/page/unsubscribe/"). Help us continue transforming American politics and fighting for progressive candidates and causes by [contributing to Our Revolution here](https://go.ourrevolution.com/page/m/2ba7ac6d/bed43eb/5acf971b/75fe6d5a/2973384960/VEsB/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/ourrevolution?refcode=email-footer-OR").

But Friend, if our end-of-quarter numbers are big, the Washington establishment will not be able to ignore us.

If we work together, I'm positive we can reach our goal. To make it even easier, one generous donor has stepped up and agreed to match every donation we get before our END OF QUARTER deadline.

**That means a gift of $50, is really $100. If you give $100, it's really $200, and so on...**

This email was sent to [dpwillis67@gmail.com](http://links.iterable.com/e/eh?_t=80d255427d5b4d6fa3cb87d23cf0003e&_m=b55fbfe4338b4241bf9b260e86d8bd20&_e=NqbH_fXO6Sx6_KdM07zwxT2zy4l1AqfMPmLB982ps5JMaP3YwvPu9Gg1taDxNQ_r3S-Juk0hcTIaaLjrABu9pE2eLGiJ2B1iGxuJTpKo9LslzeJdsPcLVBN5Jv393bQb0nmPYTlKCfYKmvwsaOcuPrKiag8DnVjJ_bPNJYf_sM45oY66yUpOEd1N7eYhkDpT2N_o6AAMk9IEYWDi6HO3UvxZKNVuB-qVEp6dVOvabrpJOCMkPiOjHDo-TqbEvIX2). Thank you for helping to make Wisconsin a better place for our children and grandchildren. Together, we can continue to make change in our great state. I got into politics because I dared to question the reading practices being used in my daughter’s kindergarten class. For that, they literally sent me to the principal’s office. Can you imagine that? That moment got me started on my mission to expand opportunities for education across Wisconsin, but we have a whole lot further to go. What are the [issues](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=80d255427d5b4d6fa3cb87d23cf0003e&_m=b55fbfe4338b4241bf9b260e86d8bd20&_e=b02feMvSID0VDoAgqNxZPUaYc25-qFTc-TNhLzFgUmsddMC7FF-rGlcOofVvnZ6qedRv8VrOipe3Kq5dpzQuAan-FdaN90erarj3yViye4_7AWT5FIY9oVEtfdQI-l6spkSaBKs6KailfLGN87PdQBcQcuOciBEgfNhO766zhGSODuzv_TBq5Oq_jcN1Q_2V_38fcHkV-X42bvHhFdaVJm6r05JdlyGTgs_i9HpNAJ5oAJArJMSVSIDSfQI8x6PbPiCW_qI8pz0mCGZL8hPBBF5_gJGZgpOwIW6m1v4p9zN0zgtHuk15jqcAAtuvXUpoRbu7yK52xD_uCY6-7GXDetKfchcQu8Au2JeMRegxp3HHNN7Mky9hodjLyRRTej7j) that you care about? If the past few years have taught me anything, it’s that if you want to make change, you have to stand up and lead. So I’m asking you, to [stand up](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=80d255427d5b4d6fa3cb87d23cf0003e&_m=b55fbfe4338b4241bf9b260e86d8bd20&_e=b02feMvSID0VDoAgqNxZPUaYc25-qFTc-TNhLzFgUmu0ZQ95nT1bKcOHDGvy6BV2tSK5nVOKoHat1q6jhexwt8uDYIome_gA3fTriDYeppSHyxnfmbGHV_sA-t2hkAsNgKk7LMG1WPJJCgu2Yp1k7SA75fUsk_sPn9hVxzNePcugxdYu-Yi6-plr1bDCUdZizlnCP6V5ScqBZIS1o3e_fsZkEXPaAPIWJD_hY6anfLoterWHzRRN22SU1FXiFpRpKJO4DdDKAOnl58e-kTWAKfJYNxHm4ZuQLEdhPwMq6fHvnr5KxDjb-MWf2F7O1c5JJZj5SfCYDxXv-AFRai1JKOdEgCxBaOc5iGHS8a97Y2c4B8heaDmgTledIN17OyIT) to help me take the Wisconsin way to Washington. Already signed up? Looking to take the next step? Well, the first step is to like my campaign on [Facebook](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=80d255427d5b4d6fa3cb87d23cf0003e&_m=b55fbfe4338b4241bf9b260e86d8bd20&_e=b02feMvSID0VDoAgqNxZPS59vLCYKT3HXI4Yb3Vu6QE_i4fv1CdLkgx-waI7CI8cgfQDD87Qg0zBfkedMQA-JoJ6zEJ1SYQxElGDhnfrOgFS-vQKEg9IUTEvPS_cv1enBvL3UKVBnXvCJwwCQYVKWoQfhO1LEyziBB5RwzLGVRDFCdOxOHgIw5qYCmwC78FMBs8GznFhquycbnbxHK_vjHDg6_-VV4fVRpagbG1IWQnkJXt610sJChwt_Pu4kpRqAvupTfCla9iUkeUocYI9Xw%3D%3D), follow us on [Twitter](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=80d255427d5b4d6fa3cb87d23cf0003e&_m=b55fbfe4338b4241bf9b260e86d8bd20&_e=b02feMvSID0VDoAgqNxZPQlUXfkEIMGA4gwRy1bWQplWHkqb9JD9SlVEf6YWF5kVlukngdt1jEVbZ6Tu7AlmJ7Jnalw9uYXGl-pjsK85iFYVxT9r9vwn4ggPWPu8dTn3VEsRdjKFYFlr1_ZY7PVJe51dvtoWFsGZwrTRGyN83Ksf5XBZhAqtfaxGZcpI-RPsitmadu4UWEu3lf3FhU7zgHpLeYfHuwwZ4bweTQk9ymKr1cBnW1YdO0Y6LmPBcJTUDYXw72IHFWBQB7gqeQX_WQ%3D%3D), and check out my [Instagram](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=80d255427d5b4d6fa3cb87d23cf0003e&_m=b55fbfe4338b4241bf9b260e86d8bd20&_e=b02feMvSID0VDoAgqNxZPfZHGmHZLbukiVnontz3GlSktZWK7o8uX-r5BO6fbjJvL_zK45p7HvXa-8a4gvBOKw6mzcpkO-5KgfKxH718DxrbigjU2rQKoaYXZNW1WwJmUioqXxNCct_0sFIdqh5EPL6JH4wLr2sP7iOWZoWr9aJozpWRJseFivOozMsVB9Y2AJ3YaF4gxfhqkj_5QH_WgVLVvPIXUvluGGQWqSgBb0bVPxUEuBr2ePj2KZLplNeNwqJFp6Ks-HCNAkYTmrE9zw%3D%3D) feed. My team and I share lots of great news from the trail there... but considering that you’re still reading, you’re clearly a fighter. A true Wisconsinite. For you, I’d like to invite you to join my [text messaging program](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=80d255427d5b4d6fa3cb87d23cf0003e&_m=b55fbfe4338b4241bf9b260e86d8bd20&_e=b02feMvSID0VDoAgqNxZPUaYc25-qFTc-TNhLzFgUmtAzLnS0buHYdFaei0SI6LkTqlUTZjI6jrVFheg5rXhiNXQXjM2ZB3cqM2Eyc1y6-hrFraS082g6uCZOSDfqfkoZyKmZNoZghrIzBq89_dJrNO7tp0Gx46pygCPSwvTgDOfhF4wN3hLpWwZ53pndv_QQlJWALGimwSRCgQh6u0w0rJVM3Pqi_EsWX5LI4Z_KXRO9txE58UmdqTuxFRt69x0se5hmfT2wrLdmTZypeOm7I-XY4cqr4t1seUoDpjsgGwiwJJ5OHhyi7STQFXnnQD5eKAPk2r-p4repdOOiJX1LRytYzqlRzAaM6g3S8W377oBUEU11k9gLv1OGayiELujCQd9zz8OLLxVJFNZQET-gQ%3D%3D) so I can share exclusive information with you via text. That’s how I keep my closest team members in the loop. Now if your tired of emails cluttering your inbox, I’ll be sad to see you go, but I understand. Click [here](http://links.iterable.com/e/eh?_t=80d255427d5b4d6fa3cb87d23cf0003e&_m=b55fbfe4338b4241bf9b260e86d8bd20&_e=NqbH_fXO6Sx6_KdM07zwxT2zy4l1AqfMPmLB982ps5JMaP3YwvPu9Gg1taDxNQ_r3S-Juk0hcTIaaLjrABu9pE2eLGiJ2B1iGxuJTpKo9LslzeJdsPcLVBN5Jv393bQb0nmPYTlKCfYKmvwsaOcuPrKiag8DnVjJ_bPNJYf_sM45oY66yUpOEd1N7eYhkDpT2N_o6AAMk9IEYWDi6HO3UvxZKNVuB-qVEp6dVOvabrpJOCMkPiOjHDo-TqbEvIX2) to choose which updates you’d like to get, and click [here](http://links.iterable.com/e/eh?_t=80d255427d5b4d6fa3cb87d23cf0003e&_m=b55fbfe4338b4241bf9b260e86d8bd20&_e=NqbH_fXO6Sx6_KdM07zwxT2zy4l1AqfMPmLB982ps5JMaP3YwvPu9Gg1taDxNQ_r3S-Juk0hcTIaaLjrABu9pE2eLGiJ2B1iGxuJTpKo9LslzeJdsPcLVBN5Jv393bQb0nmPYTlKCfYKmvwsaOcuPrKiag8DnVjJ_bPNJYf_sM45oY66yUpOEd1N7eYhkDpT2N_o6AAMk9IEYWDi6HO3UvxZKNVuB-qVEp6dVOvabrpJOCMkPiOjHDo-TqbEvIX2) to unsubscribe. Remember, contributions to Leah for Senate are not tax deductible.
clean_body: It’s our first END OF QUARTER fundraising deadline of 2018, and as of this email, we are just short of reaching our goals. Friend, we’re just 1 day away from the biggest test our campaign has faced. It’s our first END OF QUARTER fundraising deadline of 2018, and as of this email, we are just short of reaching our goals. We have $16,039 left to go. As I’ve said before, these FEC deadlines are a tool of the Washington elite. It's how they choose winners and losers. The candidates with big donors who make the most money are deemed "worthy," while little guys like us -- who rely on grassroots donors -- are deemed less prepared for office. But Friend, if our end-of-quarter numbers are big, the Washington establishment will not be able to ignore us. If we work together, I'm positive we can reach our goal. To make it even easier, one generous donor has stepped up and agreed to match every donation we get before our END OF QUARTER deadline. That means a gift of $50, is really $100. If you give $100, it's really $200, and so on... Don't pass up the opportunity to chip in now! Friend, I know you and I both have had enough of the so-called leaders who have made careers out of supporting Washington politics as usual. It’s time for real, conservative change. But to do that, we have to raise that $16,039 before this deadline. Please, Friend, let’s show them we’re serious. Let’s exceed every expectation, and close out this quarter with a huge bang. Thank you, Friend. Leah Paid for by Leah for Senate

name: Kelly, Finance Director
subject: This is our chance
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Donnelly for Indiana
body:
For the last year, this race has been a "toss-up" or "leans Republican" race, depending on the latest forecasts. |
---

| | | [](http://action.joeforindiana.com/page/m/7f7c2395/7377f838/31bd1505/51fa93d2/3601845185/VEsH/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jd-marcheoq2018nd?refcode=20180330.2nd&amount=10")
---
Peter,

For the last year, this race has been a "toss-up" or "leans Republican" race, depending on the latest forecasts. The Koch brothers have spent more than $6 MILLION against Joe so far because they want an Indiana senator who will cave to their agenda. **But Joe doesn 't work for them, and he certainly doesn't work for Mitch McConnell either. He works for Hoosiers.**

**And to _keep_ Joe working for you, we need a hand. A critical finance deadline is approaching tomorrow, and we're closing in on our goal -- but we still have a ways to go. Will you pitch in now to make sure we hit our target of 15,000 donors (and have your gift MATCHED)?**
_If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_
---
**[Express donate $10>>](http://action.joeforindiana.com/page/m/7f7c2395/7377f838/31bd1505/51fa93cd/3601845185/VEsE/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jd-marcheoq2018nd?express_lane=true&refcode=20180330.2nd&amount=10")**
**[Express donate $25>>](http://action.joeforindiana.com/page/m/7f7c2395/7377f838/31bd1505/51fa93cc/3601845185/VEsF/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jd-marcheoq2018nd?express_lane=true&refcode=20180330.2nd&amount=25")**
**[Express donate $50>>](http://action.joeforindiana.com/page/m/7f7c2395/7377f838/31bd1505/51fa93cf/3601845185/VEsC/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jd-marcheoq2018nd?express_lane=true&refcode=20180330.2nd&amount=50")**
**[Express donate $100>>](http://action.joeforindiana.com/page/m/7f7c2395/7377f838/31bd1505/51fa93ce/3601845185/VEsD/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jd-marcheoq2018nd?express_lane=true&refcode=20180330.2nd&amount=100")**
****[Or, donate a different amount>>](http://action.joeforindiana.com/page/m/7f7c2395/7377f838/31bd1505/51fa93c9/3601845185/VEsA/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jd-marcheoq2018nd?refcode=20180330.2nd")****
**Our finance reports are constantly scrutinized, and we need this one to show Joe 's grassroots-funded campaign is a winning strategy.**

Special interests will keep fighting to get Joe out of the Senate and replace him with someone who's beholden to them -- not to Hoosiers. We can't let that happen.

**This is Joe 's chance to pull ahead, but he needs your help. [Will you join this campaign and help us reach 15,000 supporters?](http://action.joeforindiana.com/page/m/7f7c2395/7377f838/31bd1505/51fa93d2/3601845185/VEsB/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jd-marcheoq2018nd?refcode=20180330.2nd&amount=10")**

We appreciate your help as we approach this **critical** deadline!

\-- Kelly

** **
**[**CONTRIBUTE**](http://action.joeforindiana.com/page/m/7f7c2395/7377f838/31bd1505/51fa93c8/3601845185/VEsO/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jd-marcheoq2018nd?refcode=20180330.2nd&amount=25")**
---
** **

|
---

Paid for by Donnelly for Indiana
---

P.O. Box 891, Indianapolis, IN 46206
[Unsubscribe](http://action.joeforindiana.com/page/m/7f7c2395/7377f838/31bd1505/51fa93cb/3601845185/VEsP/ "http://action.joeforindiana.com/unsubscribe")

name: Geoff Burgan, Andrew Gillum for Governor
subject: I promise, this is short.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Andrew Gillum, Democrat, for Governor
body:
[](http://act.andrewgillum.com/page/m/fcb313a/9e00690/45ef7b9d/24024c61/1395488453/VEsH/ "https://andrewgillum.com/?utm_medium=email&utm_source=gillum&utm_content=1&utm_campaign=em18_180330_EOQ5_fnd_gq_act__GB&source=em18_180330_EOQ5_fnd_gq_act__GB")
Friend,

With Passover starting in just a few hours and Easter weekend beginning, we know a lot of people are spending this weekend with family, so I'm going to keep this short -- we're still $5,786 away from reaching our end-of-quarter fundraising goal.

**[Can you rush a donation of $5, or whatever you can afford, before tomorrow's deadline?](http://act.andrewgillum.com/page/m/fcb313a/9e00690/45ef7b9d/24024c60/1395488453/VEsE/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/gillum-march-eoq?utm_campaign=em18_180330_EOQ5_fnd_gq_act__GB&utm_medium=email&utm_source=Gillum&refcode=em18_180330_EOQ5_fnd_gq_act__GB&utm_content=2+-+Can+you+rush+a+donation+of+5+or+whatever")**

We have the chance to nominate the most progressive Democratic candidate this August in the primary and then elect a leader who will help rebuild Florida into a state that works for all of us this November. We need someone who has fought for these ideas -- not politicians who are changing their tune in an election year.

**[Chip in $5 before midnight tomorrow and help us meet our end-of-quarter goal.](http://act.andrewgillum.com/page/m/fcb313a/9e00690/45ef7b9d/24024c63/1395488453/VEsF/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/gillum-march-eoq?utm_campaign=em18_180330_EOQ5_fnd_gq_act__GB&utm_medium=email&utm_source=Gillum&refcode=em18_180330_EOQ5_fnd_gq_act__GB&utm_content=3+-+Chip+in+5+before+midnight+tomorrow+and+h")**

Thank you,

Geoff Burgan
Communications Director
Andrew Gillum for Governor

[Donate](http://act.andrewgillum.com/page/m/fcb313a/9e00690/45ef7b9d/24024c62/1395488453/VEsC/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/gillum-march-eoq?utm_campaign=em18_180330_EOQ5_fnd_gq_act__GB&utm_medium=email&utm_source=Gillum&refcode=em18_180330_EOQ5_fnd_gq_act__GB&utm_content=4+-+Donate")

Paid for by Andrew Gillum, Democrat, for Governor.

---
Andrew Gillum for Governor
1550 Melvin Street,
Tallahassee, FL 32303

**NH REPUBLICAN PARTY**
**WEEKLY NEWSLETTER**
**FRIDAY, MARCH 30TH**
|
---
**_A Note From Jeanie_**
**Dear Derek,**

**As we near the end of session, our focus turns intently to the 2018 election cycle and recruiting candidates to run for office. Here at the NHGOP, Vice Chair Wayne MacDonald is spearheading this effort and I’m pleased to say we’ve got a great plan of action.**
****
**We’ve started the recruiting effort by identifying seats that are open and seats currently held by a Democrat. Our efforts are collaborative, working with the House and the Senate in partnership as they confirm members who are planning to run and those retiring. Wayne has been reaching out to the County and City Chairs and working with them to identify candidates. I’ve also been meeting with potential candidates and encouraging them to run for office.**
****
**Beginning Wednesday, April 11th, and every Wednesday evening for the next few months, the NHGOP will be hosting a candidates’ night at our offices at 10 Water Street from 6 – 7:30 p.m. Anyone who is interested in running for office can show up and learn more about what it takes to run a successful campaign and talk with folks who’ve served in the legislature. With the June 6 – 15 filing period coming up fast, we can provide you with guidance on how to move forward.**
****
**On June 23rd we will host a candidates' training for anyone who has signed up to run. The training will include sessions on messaging, issues education, fundraising, and how to get your name out there. We are ready to make your run for higher office a successful one!**

[**If you are interested in running, sign up at NH.GOP/Action to get involved today!**](nh.gop/action)

**Sincerely, **

**Jeanie**
**Join the Grassroots Circle!**

**The Grassroots Circle is a unique way for you to get involved while supporting the Party.**

**Becoming a member couldn't be easier -- join today for as little as $10 per month. There are three levels of support: The Grassroots Supporter, the NHGOP Advocate and the VIP Investor.**
[ **More Information** ](http://email.robly.com/wf/click?upn=5MdO6cLza2MazVJVOHyurnZ5zJfDwV5-2F8Hl4xre-2BIMt5nd0pHim8EqEA9pV9ZCkm_enNSH-2FxHAAqXgxiHRFihpX91d75ERAkpfg4XQfmYhCFb47pW8iDRAYLsM9sf9wIa92fG-2FsxU68zXzzMA2nO2VCunl2bm-2FhLXsWS8P3XITs28GUU7Mnlu37POPaWv9myv4YWBbFU9plZi0-2B42tZfBaUujH4mxA3e6jOiyDa5q6HKz45-2B17g6DUNL-2BnIMAR30M3-2FBW9ea-2ByOG5NgaGIP1QmE7D5fba24ryZFCDkuLBy8r0po83g6G0bN8lBVYH8X2y90FdFUIVkPFAafhkN8UCXgFd2D7gnMSZcSjPRuLLJi3gOSEn2SAbu2HOle9t7xzQK58RMQ4v3l7HkHUXO9hjWZ-2B4vJ0OP3PpzI2y0PNbeJfCgvtdKXZwXkAsW36LKAGWDND-2BtCIIgO3wyYFQvYJOkVPENRhwv6wwQC62CZK0KUEGyce7-2Bk-2FaC4w3JGpFVhqvaJMb303hJPUSOziNMX-2Fd3g-3D-3D)

clean_body: | | nh.gop NH REPUBLICAN PARTY WEEKLY NEWSLETTER FRIDAY, MARCH 30TH | A Note From Jeanie Dear Derek, As we near the end of session, our focus turns intently to the 2018 election cycle and recruiting candidates to run for office. Here at the NHGOP, Vice Chair Wayne MacDonald is spearheading this effort and I’m pleased to say we’ve got a great plan of action. ** We’ve started the recruiting effort by identifying seats that are open and seats currently held by a Democrat. Our efforts are collaborative, working with the House and the Senate in partnership as they confirm members who are planning to run and those retiring. Wayne has been reaching out to the County and City Chairs and working with them to identify candidates. I’ve also been meeting with potential candidates and encouraging them to run for office. Beginning Wednesday, April 11th, and every Wednesday evening for the next few months, the NHGOP will be hosting a candidates’ night at our offices at 10 Water Street from 6 – 7:30 p.m. Anyone who is interested in running for office can show up and learn more about what it takes to run a successful campaign and talk with folks who’ve served in the legislature. With the June 6 – 15 filing period coming up fast, we can provide you with guidance on how to move forward. On June 23rd we will host a candidates' training for anyone who has signed up to run. The training will include sessions on messaging, issues education, fundraising, and how to get your name out there. We are ready to make your run for higher office a successful one! nh.gop/action Sincerely, Jeanie Join the Grassroots Circle! The Grassroots Circle is a unique way for you to get involved while supporting the Party. Becoming a member couldn't be easier -- join today for as little as $10 per month. There are three levels of support: The Grassroots Supporter, the NHGOP Advocate and the VIP Investor. Intern with the NH GOP! Are you a student or know a student that is interested in Politics? Learn the skills necessary to win elections and meet the Republican leaders that govern our State and write legislation. CD1 Trivia! Governor Sununu's Easter Egg Hunt! Saturday, March 31st Starts at 10 AM State House Lawn! PRIORITIES TAX REFORM SPECIFICS EVENT SPOTLIGHT Sign up by April 1st to get 2 tickets for the price of 1! UPCOMING EVENTS PHOTO OF THE WEEK Governor Chris Sununu announcing the national roll out of Recovery Friendly Workplaces, an initiative he started in New Hampshire earlier this month! REPUBLICAN SPOTLIGHT This week our Republican spotlight is the Easter Bunny! The Easter Bunny believes in charity and knows we can spread more cheer and joy through individual acts of kindness than supporting Government handouts. Thank you, Easter Bunny, for all you do! TWEETS OF THE WEEK Tweet With Us! | VIDEO OF SENATE PRESIDENT MORSE AT RED TOWN HALL RNC LAUNCHES "PAYCHECK PRESIDENT" WEBSITE House Speaker Gene Chandler Website "FOLLOW" on Twitter "LIKE" on Facebook Senate President Chuck Morse Website "FOLLOW" on Twitter "LIKE" on Facebook Executive Council Website "FOLLOW" on Twitter "LIKE" on Facebook Governor Chris Sununu Web - "LIKE" on Facebook - "FOLLOW" on Twitter - Web - Facebook - Twitter - Chairman Jeanie Forrester "LIKE" on Facebook - "FOLLOW" on Twitter - 10 Water Street, Concord, NH 03301 Phone: tel:6032259341 "tel:6032259341" | Email: mailto:info@nhgop.org "info@nhgop.org" • • mailto:info@nhgop.org "info@nhgop.org" | This email was sent to mailto:dpwillis67@gmail.com Republican Party of New Hampshire 10 Water Street Concord New Hampshire * 03301

name: Donna Edwards
subject: Putting people first
body:
|
---
[ ](http://action.donnaforprincegeorges.org/page/m/74feff0d/767134fb/5ca15b5c/4338265e/709596924/VEsH/ "http://www.donnaforprincegeorges.org/")

| | Hi Friend, As Women's History Month comes to a close, I reflect on my personal hero, Shirley Chisholm. She was the first Black woman elected to Congress, and the first woman ever to seek the Democratic Party presidential nomination. I am reminded of the time she famously said, "If they don't give you a seat at the table, bring a folding chair." As Prince George's County Executive, I will give working families, women, small businesses, and young people a seat at the table. I will make sure that their voices are heard, and that we create policies that put the hard-working people of Prince George's County first. It's time to end the reign of those who submit to the whims of wealthy developers and donors. I need your help to make my commitment a reality.**[Can you make a donation of $10 or more to help me continue the work of ensuring the needs of every member of our community are met?](http://action.donnaforprincegeorges.org/page/m/74feff0d/767134fb/5ca15b5c/4338265f/709596924/VEsE/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/dfe-website?refcode=website") ** As County Executive, my promise to you is that I will be committed to creating a better community for the hard-working people who call this county home--not to lining the wallets of big developers. Please help me raise another $12,489 to reach my goal of $15,000. I cannot win this race alone, and that is why I am asking for your support.**[I hope you will consider making a contribution of $10 or more so I can continue the work of my people-powered campaign for Prince George's County Executive. ](http://action.donnaforprincegeorges.org/page/m/74feff0d/767134fb/5ca15b5c/4338265f/709596924/VEsF/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/dfe-website?refcode=website")** Thank you for your continued support. In the "unbossed and unbought" spirit of Shirley Chisholm, together we will create a better Prince George's County. Donna
---
|
---

| Team,

I just spoke with Juan, and we're making great progress toward our FEC goal...but we still have a ways to go.

[**We still need to raise $15,450 before midnight tomorrow if we 're going to submit a strong FEC report and reach our new organizing budget goal.**](http://act.floridadems. "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/fdp-2018-fec-deadline-q1?amount=5&recurring=true&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=34223&city=Englewood&state=&occupation=&employer=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=fldems&utm_content=1+-+We+still+need+to+raise+15450+before+midn&utm_campaign=FDP_EM_FR_180DO_180330_3_9&source=FDP_EM_FR_180DO_180330_3_9&refcode=FDP_EM_FR_180DO_180330_3_9")

It's going to take all of us pitching in to reach this goal, but I haven't seen your name yet on our fundraising update -- can you contribute right now so we receive your gift before the FEC deadline?

This is probably our last FEC deadline before Rick Scott announces he's running for Senate, so we can't risk looking unprepared in our FEC report.

[**http://act.floridadems.org/support-our-critical-fec-report**](http://act.floridadems. "" It's going to take all of us pitching in to reach this goal, but I haven't seen your name yet on our fundraising update -- can you contribute right now so we receive your gift before the FEC deadline? This is probably our last FEC deadline before Rick Scott announces he's running for Senate, so we can't risk looking unprepared in our FEC report. "" Democrats are depending on you. If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will process immediately by clicking a button below. Otherwise, you will be redirected to a donation page.
